reviews.author: Ma Lirra Silverio
reviews.text: On Easter Sunday, I joined friends for dinner at a local cafe specializing in Singaporean cuisine. The meal was a resounding success, with each dish showcasing the chef's skill and attention to detail. The Singapore Laksa was a standout, offering a complex, aromatic flavor profile and a moderate level of spiciness that added depth without overwhelming. I also appreciated the hot Kopi Tarik, which provided a welcome boost of caffeine. The cafe owners were consummate hosts, taking the time to engage with us and ensure our experience was nothing short of outstanding. In my opinion, they earned a well-deserved 10/10⭐️.
reviews.textTranslated: Pada hari Minggu Paskah, saya bergabung dengan teman-teman untuk makan malam di sebuah kafe lokal yang khusus menyajikan masakan Singapura. Makanannya sangat sukses, dengan setiap hidangan menunjukkan keahlian dan perhatian koki terhadap detail. Laksa Singapura adalah hidangan yang luar biasa, menawarkan profil rasa yang kompleks dan aromatik serta tingkat kepedasan sedang yang menambah kedalaman rasa tanpa berlebihan. Saya juga menyukai Kopi Tarik panas, yang memberikan dorongan kafein yang menyegarkan. Pemilik kafe adalah tuan rumah yang sempurna, meluangkan waktu untuk berinteraksi dengan kami dan memastikan pengalaman kami luar biasa. Menurut saya, mereka pantas mendapatkan 10/10⭐️.

reviews.author: Bahaiyyih Pride
reviews.text: Delicious! Great service and nice vibes. Loved it!
reviews.textTranslated: Enak sekali! Pelayanannya bagus dan suasananya menyenangkan. Saya suka sekali!

reviews.author: RandJ Noel
reviews.text:
Last night we checked out Hawker Buns Singapore Burger Cafe on the Bedford highway, where Attithi used to be. The signage still says Attithi, until you get close enough to see the big signs in the window. A real sleeper that's worth trying if you like new flavours. Not too spicy, not "weird" but super tasty and like nothing else I've had in Halifax. They have unique burgers, and started as take-out only, but have expanded into traditional Singaporean foods. Singapore has a really interesting cultural combo of Malay, Indonesian and Chinese communities.
Bright and clean seating area, and lovely hospitable service. Hubby had the roasted Hainanese chicken over rice, I had the salted egg fried chicken, with coconut rice and we shared crispy eggplant. The salted egg sounded scary, but it was a delicious creamy rich sauce on crispy chicken bites. Really hard to describe--but really tasty. And rice? You know how rice is usually the "filler" that's good for mopping up sauce? I started that way but realized the rice needed to be its own bite because it tastes SO GOOD and you probably won't be able to figure out why. (I couldn't.)   I also loved the iced milk tea, can't remember what the menu term was, but it was great.
These folks love sharing their hospitality and this great food. I really want to see them thrive so I can keep going back and eating there!  Check it out, you won't regret it.
reviews.textTranslated:
Tadi malam kami mengunjungi Hawker Buns Singapore Burger Cafe di jalan raya Bedford, tempat Attithi dulu berada. Papan namanya masih bertuliskan Attithi, sampai Anda cukup dekat untuk melihat papan nama besar di jendela. Tempat yang patut dicoba jika Anda menyukai cita rasa baru. Tidak terlalu pedas, tidak "aneh" tetapi sangat lezat dan tidak seperti apa pun yang pernah saya makan di Halifax. Mereka memiliki burger yang unik, dan awalnya hanya untuk dibawa pulang, tetapi telah berkembang ke makanan tradisional Singapura. Singapura memiliki kombinasi budaya yang sangat menarik dari komunitas Melayu, Indonesia, dan Tionghoa.
Area tempat duduk yang terang dan bersih, dan pelayanan yang ramah. Suami saya memesan ayam panggang Hainan dengan nasi, saya memesan ayam goreng telur asin, dengan nasi kelapa dan kami berbagi terong goreng renyah. Telur asin terdengar menakutkan, tetapi itu adalah saus kental yang lezat di atas potongan ayam renyah. Sangat sulit untuk dijelaskan—tetapi sangat lezat. Dan nasi? Anda tahu bagaimana nasi biasanya menjadi "pengisi" yang bagus untuk menyerap saus? Awalnya saya makan nasi seperti itu, tetapi kemudian menyadari bahwa nasi perlu dimakan terpisah karena rasanya SANGAT ENAK dan Anda mungkin tidak akan bisa menjelaskan alasannya. (Saya sendiri tidak bisa.) Saya juga suka es teh susunya, saya lupa istilah di menunya, tapi rasanya enak sekali.
Orang-orang ini senang berbagi keramahan dan makanan enak ini. Saya sangat ingin melihat mereka sukses agar saya bisa terus kembali dan makan di sana! Cobalah, Anda tidak akan menyesal.

reviews.author: Luis Dahonog
reviews.text: This restaurant takes me and my wife back to Singapore. Their foods were amazing, authentic, really caught the taste i’ve been craving for years, the sauces/condiments were on point, seriously——delicious. Not to mention the professionalism of the owners, Shiela and Eric, their hospitality is top notched. Even my boys have already planned what to order on our next visit. Highly recommended.
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran ini membawa saya dan istri saya kembali ke Singapura. Makanan mereka luar biasa, otentik, benar-benar menghadirkan cita rasa yang saya idamkan selama bertahun-tahun, saus/bumbu pelengkapnya sangat pas, serius—lezat. Belum lagi profesionalisme pemiliknya, Shiela dan Eric, keramahan mereka sangat luar biasa. Bahkan anak-anak saya sudah merencanakan apa yang akan dipesan pada kunjungan kami berikutnya. Sangat direkomendasikan.

reviews.author: Diana Cable
reviews.text: We have had food from Singapore Hawker Buns several times now. We can highly recommend the food. It’s delicious. The Salted Egg Chicken Rice and Golden Eggplant are our current favourites!
reviews.textTranslated: Kami sudah beberapa kali makan di Singapore Hawker Buns. Kami sangat merekomendasikan makanannya. Rasanya enak sekali. Nasi Ayam Telur Asin dan Terong Emas adalah favorit kami saat ini!

reviews.author: Dulce Davis
reviews.text: Second time being at Hawkers, and Chef Eric did not fail us. Food is extremely exquisite. Love it.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini kunjungan kedua kami ke Hawkers, dan Chef Eric tidak mengecewakan kami. Makanannya sangat lezat. Saya menyukainya.

reviews.author: joanne s
reviews.text: Super delicious food lah! And I really love their Singapore lemon iced tea lah!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya super enak! Dan aku beneran suka banget es teh lemon Singapura mereka!

reviews.author: james graham
reviews.text: We went there for dinner tonight with some friends and were pleasantly surprised with the great food and the fantastic service.Every thing we ordered was fantastic and well worth the price. We were greeted by one of the friendliest staff members. She introduced us to the chef who explained the dishes and a bit about his history.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami pergi ke sana untuk makan malam malam ini bersama beberapa teman dan sangat terkejut dengan makanan yang enak dan pelayanan yang fantastis. Semua yang kami pesan sangat fantastis dan sepadan dengan harganya. Kami disambut oleh salah satu anggota staf yang paling ramah. Dia memperkenalkan kami kepada koki yang menjelaskan hidangan dan sedikit tentang sejarahnya.

reviews.author: Julia M
reviews.text: The best food!!!!!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan terbaik!!!!!!!

reviews.author: Sami Bashir
reviews.text: The salted egg chicken with rice was absolutely delicious and I had to go back and try the salted egg chicken burger too. Fantastic food and always such a welcoming vibe. Can’t wait to try the drinks next.
reviews.textTranslated: Ayam telur asin dengan nasi benar-benar lezat dan saya harus kembali lagi untuk mencoba burger ayam telur asinnya juga. Makanan fantastis dan suasananya selalu ramah. Tidak sabar untuk mencoba minumannya selanjutnya.

reviews.author: William Germscheid
reviews.text: Fantastic Singaporean food, absolutely top notch and authentic. The Hainanese chicken rice is fragrent with individual rice grains each coated in flavour. The chicken is tender and the skin/fat layer perfectly aspic like. Salted egg chicken is incredibly crispy and savoury. Highly recommend the whole menu but these two items in particular!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Singapura yang fantastis, benar-benar kelas atas dan otentik. Nasi ayam Hainan-nya harum dengan butiran nasi yang terbalut bumbu. Ayamnya empuk dan lapisan kulit/lemaknya sempurna seperti agar-agar. Ayam telur asinnya sangat renyah dan gurih. Sangat merekomendasikan seluruh menu, tetapi terutama dua hidangan ini!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Wow, thank you, William for the amazing review! 💛 We’re thrilled you enjoyed the Hainanese Chicken Rice and Salted Egg Chicken,s your kind words about the flavours and textures mean so much. Can’t wait to welcome you back to explore more of the menu! 🇸🇬✨
With heartfelt thanks, 
Eric & Shiela 🫶🏻

reviews.author: Tyler
reviews.text:
My girlfriend and I stopped in for the first time, I had the salted egg chicken and she had the laksa, we both loved our meals, with her stealing a couple pieces of my chicken !

I’ve never had Singaporean food before but we will be going again as it was just so delicious !
reviews.textTranslated:
Aku dan pacarku mampir ke sana untuk pertama kalinya, aku memesan ayam telur asin dan dia memesan laksa, kami berdua sangat menyukai makanan kami, bahkan dia sampai mengambil beberapa potong ayamku!

Aku belum pernah mencoba makanan Singapura sebelumnya, tapi kami pasti akan datang lagi karena rasanya sangat enak!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Yay! 💛 Thank you, Tyler. So happy you both enjoyed your first Hawker Buns experience!  Can’t wait to welcome you back for more delicious Singaporean flavours soon! 🇸🇬✨
With heartfelt thanks, 
Eric & Shiela 🫶🏻

reviews.author: Falon Ogaick
reviews.text: I was previously one of those people afraid to try new foods, so when I saw “salted egg” I hesitated.. let me save you the trouble because when I tell you that was one of the best meals I’ve had in such a long time! It’s been over a week and I have not stopped thinking of this place since. The food was amazing, honestly blew me away! My husband is the adventurous one, so when he ordered us the eggplant.. I hesitated again, but I don’t think I’m exaggerating by saying I could’ve gotten a speeding ticket by how quickly I ate, not only all of my food, but my husband’s food as well. I will definitely be a frequent visitor here, not only for the incredible food, but the couple running this place were two of the nicest people I’ve had the pleasure of meeting. Would strongly recommend a visit here!!
reviews.textTranslated: Sebelumnya saya termasuk orang yang takut mencoba makanan baru, jadi ketika saya melihat "telur asin" saya ragu-ragu... biar saya ceritakan dulu, karena itu adalah salah satu makanan terbaik yang pernah saya makan dalam waktu yang sangat lama! Sudah lebih dari seminggu dan saya terus memikirkan tempat ini sejak itu. Makanannya luar biasa, jujur ​​saja, benar-benar membuat saya terpukau! Suami saya adalah orang yang suka mencoba hal baru, jadi ketika dia memesan terong untuk kami... saya ragu lagi, tetapi saya rasa saya tidak berlebihan ketika mengatakan bahwa saya bisa saja kena tilang karena kecepatan makan saya, tidak hanya semua makanan saya, tetapi juga makanan suami saya. Saya pasti akan sering berkunjung ke sini, tidak hanya karena makanannya yang luar biasa, tetapi pasangan yang menjalankan tempat ini adalah dua orang paling ramah yang pernah saya temui. Sangat merekomendasikan untuk berkunjung ke sini!!

reviews.author: Elpidio Palomo
reviews.text: Authentic Singaporean flavours that brought back memories of the 8 years I spent living there - damn shiok! A fantastic spot for hawker-style eats — I’ll definitely be coming back!
reviews.textTranslated: Cita rasa otentik Singapura yang membangkitkan kenangan 8 tahun saya tinggal di sana - sungguh nikmat! Tempat yang fantastis untuk makanan ala pedagang kaki lima — saya pasti akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: olivia butty
reviews.text:
Had an excellent meal at Hawker Buns Singapore Burger Cafe in Bedford tonight! I’ve been wanting to try this place for a while and am so happy I finally went. I had the salted egg chicken and rice meal and my partner had the nasi lemak burger, plus we both had a homemade lemon iced tea as well. No pics of the meals because we dove in before I remembered to take out my phone, but they were delicious with very generous portions and we both left with a takeout container of what we couldn’t finish. The rice was perfect and the salted egg chicken was perfectly fried in a really interesting, delicious sauce. My partner loved his burger as well, it was a really great combo of flavours that worked well together.

The owner Sheila chatted with us and was incredibly personable from the moment we stepped inside. She explained the menu really well and I think she’d take great care of anyone nervous to order a new cuisine 🙂

Parking out front was very easy, just note that the sign on top of the restaurant is incorrect so look for the window signs and easel sign by the road.

Will be a returning customer 😊
reviews.textTranslated:
Malam ini saya menikmati makan malam yang luar biasa di Hawker Buns Singapore Burger Cafe di Bedford! Saya sudah lama ingin mencoba tempat ini dan sangat senang akhirnya bisa mencobanya. Saya memesan ayam telur asin dan nasi, sedangkan pasangan saya memesan burger nasi lemak, ditambah kami berdua juga memesan es teh lemon buatan sendiri. Tidak ada foto makanannya karena kami langsung menyantapnya sebelum saya ingat untuk mengeluarkan ponsel, tetapi makanannya sangat lezat dengan porsi yang sangat banyak dan kami berdua membawa pulang sisa makanan yang tidak bisa kami habiskan. Nasinya sempurna dan ayam telur asinnya digoreng sempurna dengan saus yang sangat menarik dan lezat. Pasangan saya juga menyukai burgernya, perpaduan rasa yang sangat enak dan serasi.

Pemiliknya, Sheila, mengobrol dengan kami dan sangat ramah sejak kami masuk ke dalam. Dia menjelaskan menu dengan sangat baik dan saya rasa dia akan sangat membantu siapa pun yang gugup memesan masakan baru 🙂

Parkir di depan sangat mudah, hanya perlu diperhatikan bahwa papan nama di atas restoran salah, jadi carilah papan nama di jendela dan papan nama di pinggir jalan.

Saya akan menjadi pelanggan tetap 😊
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Yay!! Thank you so much, Olivia, for your thoughtful review! 💛 
We’re so happy you and your partner enjoyed your first visit and that everything hit the spot. It truly means the world to hear the flavours, portions, and rice were just right! 
We’re thrilled you felt so welcome.  We always love helping first-timers feel at home. 
Can’t wait to see you again for more tasty Hawker Buns favourites! 🇸🇬✨

With heartfelt thanks, 
Eric & Shiela 🫶🏻

reviews.author: sameeksha Arora
reviews.text: Hidden gem! Loved the food, haven’t had something like that in a very long time. True Asian flavours. We tried the Hainese chicken and rice and egg chicken! Crispiest chicken ever!
reviews.textTranslated: Permata tersembunyi! Suka banget makanannya, sudah lama banget nggak makan yang seperti ini. Cita rasa Asia yang autentik. Kami coba ayam Hainan dan nasi serta ayam telur! Ayamnya renyah banget!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Wow! Thank you, Sameeksha! We’re thrilled you enjoyed the flavours! 💛 Crispy chicken, perfect rice, and all the true Asian goodness.. looks like our hidden gem delivered 😄 
Come back soon for more Hawker Buns favourites! 

With heartfelt thanks, 
Eric & Shiela 🫶🏻

reviews.author: Lorraine Pangilinan
reviews.text:
We absolutely loved our dining experience at Hawker Buns! The food was amazing, especially the Singaporean Laksa and Teh Tarik, both tasted so authentic and comforting. It truly brought back wonderful memories of our time in Singapore. Every dish was flavorful and made with care.

What made our visit even more special was meeting the owners. They were so warm and welcoming, and we enjoyed chatting and getting to know them. Hearing their stories about their humble beginnings added such a personal touch to the experience.

We’ll definitely be back to try the other dishes!
reviews.textTranslated:
Kami sangat menyukai pengalaman bersantap kami di Hawker Buns! Makanannya luar biasa, terutama Laksa Singapura dan Teh Tarik, keduanya terasa sangat otentik dan menenangkan. Sungguh membangkitkan kenangan indah saat kami berada di Singapura. Setiap hidangan terasa lezat dan dibuat dengan penuh perhatian.

Yang membuat kunjungan kami semakin istimewa adalah bertemu dengan pemiliknya. Mereka sangat ramah dan hangat, dan kami menikmati mengobrol dan mengenal mereka. Mendengar cerita mereka tentang awal mula usaha mereka yang sederhana menambah sentuhan pribadi pada pengalaman tersebut.

Kami pasti akan kembali untuk mencoba hidangan lainnya!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much, Lorraine for your wonderful review! 💛 
We’re thrilled that the Laksa and Teh Tarik brought back such special memories of Singapore and that you enjoyed every bite. It was such a joy meeting you and sharing our story..we really love connecting with our guests and making them feel at home. 
We can’t wait to welcome you back soon! 🇸🇬✨

With sooo much love, 
Eric & Shiela 🫶🏻

reviews.author: Karma S
reviews.text: We had amazing dinner here , the food is out of this world never had something similar. The owner is very friendly and nice . Definitely will be back
reviews.textTranslated: Kami menikmati makan malam yang luar biasa di sini, makanannya sungguh lezat, belum pernah makan yang seperti ini sebelumnya. Pemiliknya sangat ramah dan baik. Pasti akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Jordan Offman
reviews.text: The food was absolutely amazing. The prices were decent for the quality. The restaurant was clean and zen cafe atmosphere. The iced tea and coffee were incredible as was the salted egg chicken burger, my mother who doesn’t usually like most foods even said it was the best chicken burger she’s ever had! They use the good French fries and the rice and all dishes are authentic! Ask for Erik and he will explain the incredible story of their food and Hawker Food Courtisans in Singapore, very interesting story! Can’t say enough good things about this. Only one things is their signage isn’t posted on the front of the building which makes this spot a secret gem hidden in HRM. I’ll definitely be back to try more things!!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya benar-benar luar biasa. Harganya wajar untuk kualitasnya. Restorannya bersih dan memiliki suasana kafe yang tenang. Es teh dan kopinya luar biasa, begitu pula burger ayam telur asinnya, ibu saya yang biasanya tidak menyukai kebanyakan makanan bahkan mengatakan itu adalah burger ayam terbaik yang pernah dia makan! Mereka menggunakan kentang goreng dan nasi yang berkualitas, dan semua hidangannya otentik! Tanyakan pada Erik dan dia akan menjelaskan kisah luar biasa tentang makanan mereka dan para pedagang kaki lima di Singapura, cerita yang sangat menarik! Saya tidak bisa berkata cukup banyak hal baik tentang tempat ini. Hanya satu hal yang kurang, yaitu papan nama mereka tidak dipasang di depan gedung, yang membuat tempat ini menjadi permata tersembunyi di HRM. Saya pasti akan kembali untuk mencoba lebih banyak menu!!

reviews.author: Jeydi
reviews.text: Great service, really kind workers, and the amount and quality of food is definitely worth it! Tried the salted egg chicken burger for the first time and it was delicious, would definitely order again.  Also recommend their milktea!
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanannya luar biasa, para pekerjanya sangat ramah, dan porsi serta kualitas makanannya benar-benar sepadan! Saya mencoba burger ayam telur asin untuk pertama kalinya dan rasanya enak sekali, pasti akan memesan lagi. Saya juga merekomendasikan milk tea mereka!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much, Jeydi for your lovely review! 💛 We’re happy you enjoyed the Salted Egg Chicken burger and our Teh Tarik (milk tea). It means a lot to hear you’ll be back, and we can’t wait to serve you more delicious Hawker Buns favourites soon!

With heartfelt thanks, 
Eric & Shiela 🫶🏻

reviews.author: Jasper Gayo
reviews.text:
Love their salted egg chicken burger, it’s super flavorful and always hits the spot. Their iced tea tastes naturally brewed and so refreshing, perfect with the food.

Eric and Shiela are very hands on and always take the time to check in and make sure customers feel welcome and taken care of. You can really feel the care they put into everything.

Bonus, they love vitage HD speakers, so you get to enjoy your food with relaxing instrumental music and nicely balanced audio. It makes the whole dining experience even better.

Overall we love the food and the service. Definitely coming back again.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya suka burger ayam telur asin mereka, rasanya sangat lezat dan selalu memuaskan. Es teh mereka terasa seperti diseduh secara alami dan sangat menyegarkan, sangat cocok dengan makanan.

Eric dan Shiela sangat terlibat dan selalu meluangkan waktu untuk memeriksa dan memastikan pelanggan merasa disambut dan diperhatikan. Anda benar-benar dapat merasakan perhatian yang mereka berikan dalam segala hal.

Sebagai bonus, mereka menyukai speaker HD vintage, jadi Anda dapat menikmati makanan Anda dengan musik instrumental yang menenangkan dan audio yang seimbang. Ini membuat seluruh pengalaman bersantap menjadi lebih baik.

Secara keseluruhan, kami menyukai makanan dan pelayanannya. Pasti akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Navjot Sandila
reviews.text: Amazing food and very friendly owners. You can tell how much care they put into their restaurant. I had a great experience
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan yang luar biasa dan pemiliknya sangat ramah. Terlihat jelas betapa besar perhatian yang mereka curahkan untuk restoran mereka. Saya memiliki pengalaman yang menyenangkan.

reviews.author: Parth Gulati
reviews.text: Great drinks. Amazing people.
reviews.textTranslated: Minuman yang enak. Orang-orang yang luar biasa.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Parth, 
Amazing people love amazing guests like you! Thanks for stopping by. Can’t wait to serve you again. 💛

reviews.author: TAH Truong
reviews.text: This is a bit of a late review, but we visited this place last month and it really hit the spot. The food was fresh and tasty, and the drinks were great too. The owner, who is aslo the cook, was very friendly and made us feel right at home. We also appreciated how clean the place was, especially the rest room. We’ll definitely drop by again next time we’re in town.
reviews.textTranslated: Ulasan ini agak terlambat, tetapi kami mengunjungi tempat ini bulan lalu dan benar-benar memuaskan. Makanannya segar dan enak, dan minumannya juga luar biasa. Pemiliknya, yang juga koki, sangat ramah dan membuat kami merasa seperti di rumah sendiri. Kami juga menghargai kebersihan tempat itu, terutama toiletnya. Kami pasti akan mampir lagi lain kali kami berada di kota ini.

reviews.author: Ganesha Balakrishnan
reviews.text: I’m Singaporean and I found the food very authentic in taste and preparation. It was a nice find one fine day, when I was craving some food from back home. I had the laksa and chicken rice, and both tasted exactly like how they’ve tasted like if ordered at a local kopitiam in singapore. The owners were also very friendly and welcoming, and it was clear that they took pride in their restaurant and cuisine! Will definitely visit again!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya orang Singapura dan saya merasa makanannya sangat otentik dari segi rasa dan penyajian. Sungguh menyenangkan menemukannya di suatu hari yang cerah, ketika saya mendambakan makanan dari kampung halaman. Saya memesan laksa dan nasi ayam, dan keduanya terasa persis seperti yang pernah saya pesan di kedai kopi lokal di Singapura. Pemiliknya juga sangat ramah dan menyambut, dan jelas terlihat bahwa mereka bangga dengan restoran dan masakan mereka! Pasti akan berkunjung lagi!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Wow! Thank you, Ganesha from the bottom of our hearts for this beautiful review. We’re really glad to hear that you found the food authentic and that the laksa and chicken rice reminded you of the flavours you’d enjoy at a kopitiam back in Singapore. Knowing we could satisfy a craving for a taste of home is incredibly special to us. 
We also sincerely appreciate your kind words about our hospitality. We take great pride in our food and in making every guest feel welcome and at home.

Terima kasih, and we look forward to seeing you again soon! 😊

With lots of love, 
Eric & Shiela

reviews.author: Daniel Abensour
reviews.text: Absolutely delicious, worth the detour! We had the beef rendang and the char siew; both were outstanding. We'll be back!
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat lezat, layak untuk dikunjungi! Kami memesan rendang daging sapi dan char siew; keduanya luar biasa. Kami akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: Kevin Lawrence Burog
reviews.text: Would definitely comeback again!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Pasti akan kembali lagi!!!

reviews.author: Alexander Piercey
reviews.text:
First time having Singaporean food and it did not disappoint. The chicken burger was absolutely incredible. Can’t wait to go back and explore more of the menu/ learn about more of the traditional menu items.

The chef came to speak with me while eating in. It was easy to tell how passionate he is about his culture’s food in both the way he spoke and in the quality of the food.

Would recommend to any and all. 5/5 will be back again for sure
reviews.textTranslated:
Pertama kali mencoba makanan Singapura dan tidak mengecewakan. Burger ayamnya benar-benar luar biasa. Tak sabar untuk kembali dan mencoba lebih banyak menu/mempelajari lebih banyak tentang hidangan tradisional.

Koki datang mengobrol dengan saya saat makan. Sangat mudah untuk mengetahui betapa bersemangatnya dia tentang makanan budayanya, baik dari cara bicaranya maupun dari kualitas makanannya.

Saya merekomendasikan tempat ini kepada siapa saja. 5/5, pasti akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Keegan O'Connell
reviews.text: The food was delicious and the burger was huge.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak sekali dan burgernya besar sekali.

reviews.author: M. Kevin Acha
reviews.text: If you’re looking for authentic Singapore hawker flavours, this is it. Every bite tasted like it was made with care - rich, balanced, and deeply satisfying. The owners are warm and passionate, and you can feel the heart behind the place. So glad we found this gem in Halifax. Highly recommended!
reviews.textTranslated: Jika Anda mencari cita rasa jajanan kaki lima Singapura yang otentik, inilah tempatnya. Setiap gigitan terasa dibuat dengan penuh perhatian - kaya rasa, seimbang, dan sangat memuaskan. Pemiliknya ramah dan bersemangat, dan Anda dapat merasakan ketulusan hati di balik tempat ini. Sangat senang kami menemukan permata ini di Halifax. Sangat direkomendasikan!

reviews.author: Evelyn H
reviews.text: Hawker Buns Singapore is a gem! The flavours were incredibly authentic and instantly brought us back to Singapore where I grew up. Everything we tried was delicious, comforting, and clearly made with care. The owner couple are so passionate and welcoming—really lovely meeting them. If you’re craving real Singapore hawker food in Canada, don’t miss this spot. We’ll definitely be back!
reviews.textTranslated: Hawker Buns Singapore adalah permata tersembunyi! Cita rasanya sangat otentik dan langsung membawa kami kembali ke Singapura tempat saya dibesarkan. Semua yang kami coba enak, nyaman, dan jelas dibuat dengan penuh perhatian. Pasangan pemiliknya sangat bersemangat dan ramah—senang sekali bertemu mereka. Jika Anda mendambakan makanan kaki lima Singapura asli di Kanada, jangan lewatkan tempat ini. Kami pasti akan kembali!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much Evelyn, Kev, & Skyler for this incredibly kind review! It truly means the world to us to hear that our food brought you back to Singapore, your home. Knowing that the flavours felt authentic and comforting makes all the hard work worthwhile.
It was such a pleasure meeting you, and we’re really grateful for your support and encouragement. We look forward to welcoming you back again soon for more hawker favourites 🇸🇬✨

— Eric & Shiela 
The Hawker Buns Singapore Team

reviews.author: Cathy
reviews.text: The food here is authentic is sooo good! I'm so glad I found this place as I had been craving some authentic asian food since I have been awsy from home for a bit. I ordered the salted egg yolk chicken rice and their coffee. Both were fantastic!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan di sini otentik dan sangat enak! Saya sangat senang menemukan tempat ini karena saya sudah lama ngidam makanan Asia otentik sejak jauh dari rumah. Saya memesan nasi ayam kuning telur asin dan kopi mereka. Keduanya fantastis!

reviews.author: Mae Sy
reviews.text:
100% legit Singaporean cuisine!
We tried the Salted Egg Burger, Nasi Lemak, Hainanese Roasted Chicken Rice, Kaya Toast, and Kopi Tarik. Everything was 10/10 authentic Singaporean flavors. 🇸🇬

This place is truly a new gem in Nova Scotia. Eric, the owner chef, has showcased his amazing skills from working in 5-star hotels in Singapore and previously owning a well-known restaurant in the Philippines.

The food was incredible, and the hospitality was amazing, a classic Filipino warmth. 🇵🇭

We can’t wait to go back!
~From Moncton, NB 🙂
reviews.textTranslated:
Masakan Singapura asli 100%!

Kami mencoba Burger Telur Asin, Nasi Lemak, Nasi Ayam Panggang Hainan, Roti Bakar Kaya, dan Kopi Tarik. Semuanya 10/10 dengan cita rasa Singapura yang autentik. 🇸🇬

Tempat ini benar-benar permata baru di Nova Scotia. Eric, pemilik sekaligus koki, telah menunjukkan keahliannya yang luar biasa dari pengalamannya bekerja di hotel bintang 5 di Singapura dan sebelumnya memiliki restoran terkenal di Filipina.

Makanannya luar biasa, dan keramahannya menakjubkan, kehangatan khas Filipina. 🇵🇭

Kami tidak sabar untuk kembali!

~Dari Moncton, NB 🙂
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Wow! Thank you, Anna Mae from the bottom of my heart for this wonderful review! 🙏 
It truly means so much to us that you enjoyed the food and felt the authenticity we work hard to deliver. Sharing Singaporean flavours and genuine hospitality with guests like you is why we do this. We can’t wait to welcome you back again soon. Salamat and thank you for the love! ✨

Warmly, 
Eric 
Hawker Buns Singapore Cafe

reviews.author: H Z
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Harren :) Thank you for the glowing 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 review! Can’t wait to welcome you back! 

Warmly, 
Eric & Shiela 
Hawker Buns Singapore

reviews.author: Irene Lee
reviews.text: I went with my Singaporean husband and his two Singaporean friends. An exotic yet homey experience. Food is delicious and service is great. Nice chat with the owners too.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya pergi bersama suami saya yang orang Singapura dan dua temannya yang juga orang Singapura. Pengalaman yang eksotis namun terasa seperti di rumah sendiri. Makanannya enak dan pelayanannya bagus. Obrolan dengan pemiliknya juga menyenangkan.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Irene :) We’re so grateful you chose to visit us and shared this lovely review! Knowing that our food could bring a sense of home for you and your friends truly means the world to us. It was such a pleasure talking with you all, and we hope every visit continues to feel like a little taste of Singapore, full of flavour, warmth, and good company. We can’t wait to welcome you back! 

Thank you. ❤️

Warmly, 
Eric & Shiela
Hawker Buns Singapore

reviews.author: Renaldo Christoffels
reviews.text: Been in Canada for about 2 weeks now and the salted egg chicken and rice was the best thing that I have had in ages. No critiques and no points of improvements. Can't wait to try other things on the menu.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sudah berada di Kanada sekitar 2 minggu sekarang dan ayam telur asin dan nasi adalah makanan terbaik yang pernah saya makan dalam waktu yang lama. Tidak ada kritik dan tidak ada poin yang perlu diperbaiki. Tidak sabar untuk mencoba menu lainnya.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Wow! Thank you so much, Renaldo for the kind words! 🙌 We’re thrilled to hear that our Salted Egg Chicken Rice hit the spot. Welcome to Canada! 🇨🇦 We can’t wait for you to explore the rest of the menu and experience more of the bold flavours of Singapore. See you again soon!

Warmly, 
Eric
Hawker Buns Singapore

reviews.author: Quinn Sutherland
reviews.text: Just recently heard of this place and so glad my mother and I checked it out, was so delicious, our drinks, burger and chicken was awesome and the gentleman who served us was super polite and friendly, can’t wait to come back and try more!
reviews.textTranslated: Baru-baru ini saya mendengar tentang tempat ini dan sangat senang saya dan ibu saya mencobanya, rasanya sangat enak, minuman, burger, dan ayam kami luar biasa dan pria yang melayani kami sangat sopan dan ramah, tidak sabar untuk kembali dan mencoba yang lainnya!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much, Quinn for stopping by and for your kind words! We’re thrilled you and your mom enjoyed everything..from the drinks to the burger and chicken. 😊 We can’t wait to welcome you back for even more flavourful favourites!

Warmly, 
Eric 
Hawker Buns Singapore

reviews.author: Freya Zhang
reviews.text: Authentic Singapore food! (I used to live in Singapore) Taste really good, great service too! Owners are very friendly. 10/10
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Singapura otentik! (Saya pernah tinggal di Singapura) Rasanya enak banget, pelayanannya juga bagus! Pemiliknya ramah sekali. 10/10
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Wow, this means so much to us! 💛
Thank you, Freya for your kind words. Our pleasure meeting you. 

Knowing our food brought a taste of Singapore to someone who’s lived there truly warms our hearts.
We’re so grateful for your support and can’t wait to welcome you back for another memorable meal!

Warmly, 
Eric & Shiela 
Hawker Buns Singapore Cafe

reviews.author: Abigail Hildebrand
reviews.text: the food was absolutely delicious and the staff were the kindest! it was our first time trying singaporean cuisine, and they gave great recommendations! we decided on the singapore laksa and the salted egg chicken rice. we LOVED the meal and chatting as well. 🩷we will definitely be back to try more!! - abby and liam
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya benar-benar enak dan stafnya sangat ramah! Ini pertama kalinya kami mencoba masakan Singapura, dan mereka memberikan rekomendasi yang bagus! Kami memutuskan untuk memesan laksa Singapura dan nasi ayam telur asin. Kami SANGAT menyukai makanannya dan juga obrolannya. 🩷Kami pasti akan kembali untuk mencoba menu lainnya!! - Abby dan Liam
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much, Abby and Liam! It was truly a pleasure having you both. We’re so happy your first taste of Singaporean cuisine was a memorable one.. the Laksa and Salted Egg Chicken Rice are close to our hearts, so hearing that you loved them means a lot to us.
We really enjoyed chatting with you, too. ❤️
Can’t wait to welcome you back and share more of our favourite dishes with you!

Warmly, 
Eric & Shiela
Hawker Buns Singapore Cafe

reviews.author: Joel S
reviews.text: Had a lovely meal and a lovely conversation with Shiela and Eric: the co-owners of this small family establishment. The laksa hit the spot, and I will be coming back when I next visit Halifax. Restaurants like these are vital in diversifying the food scene, and I hope the local crowd comes out for a small taste of Singapore.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya menikmati makan malam yang menyenangkan dan percakapan yang hangat dengan Shiela dan Eric: pemilik bersama dari restoran keluarga kecil ini. Laksa-nya sangat lezat, dan saya akan kembali lagi saat berkunjung ke Halifax berikutnya. Restoran seperti ini sangat penting dalam mendiversifikasi dunia kuliner, dan saya berharap warga lokal akan datang untuk mencicipi sedikit cita rasa Singapura.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much, Joel for visiting and for the lovely conversation! We’re really glad the laksa hit the spot for you. It means a lot to hear your support for what we’re trying to bring to Halifax.
We are looking forward to welcome you back on your next trip as you’ll always have a taste of Singapore waiting here. 💛

Warmly, 
Eric & Shiela
Hawker Buns Singapore Cafe

reviews.author: AGNES LI
reviews.text: We missed the taste of Singaporean cuisines in Halifax and thanks Eric for his passion! I love the salted egg chicken rice and Hainanese Chicken Rice. Highly recommend!
reviews.textTranslated: Kami merindukan cita rasa masakan Singapura di Halifax dan terima kasih Eric atas semangatnya! Saya suka nasi ayam telur asin dan nasi ayam Hainan. Sangat direkomendasikan!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much, Agnes! 
I’m really glad our food brought back the taste of Singapore for you, and happy you loved the Salted Egg Chicken Rice and Hainanese Chicken Rice.
Thanks for the recommendation.  See you again soon! 🙌

Warmly, 
Eric 
Owner
Hawker Buns Singapore Cafe

reviews.author: Joanne Carpenter
reviews.text:
What an exceptional experience at Hawker Bun Singapore! From the moment we walked in we were treated to warm, attentive service, the kind that makes you feel like a valued guest. Great Vibe!
The meal was absolutely delicious. The kopi alone would tempt me back daily (if only I didn’t live out of town!). I savored every sip.
As for the dishes: the beef rendang was incredibly tender and savory, melting in my mouth with bold, balanced spices. Also the salted chicken kept drawing me over to my husband’s plate, crispy, flavorful, and impeccably seasoned! We had the privilege of meeting the wonderful owners - thank you! We'll absolutely look forward to our next visit :)
reviews.textTranslated:
Pengalaman yang luar biasa di Hawker Bun Singapore! Sejak kami masuk, kami disambut dengan pelayanan yang hangat dan penuh perhatian, jenis pelayanan yang membuat Anda merasa seperti tamu yang dihargai. Suasana yang menyenangkan!
Makanannya benar-benar lezat. Kopinya saja sudah cukup membuat saya ingin kembali setiap hari (kalau saja saya tidak tinggal di luar kota!). Saya menikmati setiap tegukannya.
Sedangkan untuk hidangannya: rendang daging sapinya sangat empuk dan gurih, meleleh di mulut saya dengan bumbu yang kuat dan seimbang. Ayam asinnya juga terus menarik saya ke piring suami saya, renyah, beraroma, dan bumbunya sempurna! Kami beruntung dapat bertemu dengan pemiliknya yang luar biasa - terima kasih! Kami pasti akan menantikan kunjungan kami berikutnya :)
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Wow, thank you so much for your heartfelt and thoughtful review! 🥰🇸🇬
We’re so happy to hear you felt warmly welcomed and enjoyed everything from the kopi to the beef rendang and salted chicken.. those are some of our proudest dishes! Your kind words mean the world to our small team and truly remind us why we do what we do.
It was such a joy meeting you both, your warmth and appreciation made our day! We can’t wait to welcome you back on your next visit. The kopi will be brewing, and your table will be waiting! ☕✨
— Eric & Shiela
The Hawker Buns Singapore Family

reviews.author: Rmie Rxs
reviews.text: Service is amazing, professional and warm people. Great tea drinks and love the salty and savoury food!!
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanannya luar biasa, profesional dan ramah. Minuman tehnya enak dan saya suka makanan asin dan gurihnya!!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much for the lovely review! 
We’re so happy you enjoyed the tea, the salty-savoury dishes, and our team’s warm vibes. Every bite is made to bring a little Singaporean comfort to your day!  Can’t wait to see you back soon for more tea, treats, and our signature hawker-style flavours! ❤️

Warmly, 
Eric 
Hawker Buns Singapore Cafe

reviews.author: Sleek D Games
reviews.text: Amazing establishment. Owners are sweet and kind. Service is great. Food.. outstanding. A must try.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang luar biasa. Pemiliknya ramah dan baik hati. Pelayanannya bagus. Makanannya luar biasa. Wajib dicoba.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much for your amazing review! 🇸🇬✨
We truly appreciate your kind words — it means a lot to our small team. We’re so happy you enjoyed the food, service, and warm vibes. Your support keeps us going! Hope to see you again soon for more delicious bites. ❤️

reviews.author: Edna Salame
reviews.text:
We tried this place on a last minute whim and what a pleasant surprise! The owner is a friendly expat from the Philippines who offers great recommendations. We had the roast chicken on rice and the salted egg chicken rice. The roast chicken on rice was savory, well seasoned and came with a sauce that was both flavorful and spicy. The salted egg chicken! Oh the salted egg chicken -- it was so so good. Sweet, savory and crunchy. It's served with rice and that same spicy sauce. My husband loved it so much he had to try the salt egg chicken burger. Hands down probably the best chicken burger I've ever had. So so so good and definitely worth a visit!

* At first glance there is only parking in the front but there is more parking around the side.
reviews.textTranslated:
Kami mencoba tempat ini secara spontan dan sungguh kejutan yang menyenangkan! Pemiliknya adalah seorang ekspatriat ramah dari Filipina yang memberikan rekomendasi bagus. Kami memesan ayam panggang dengan nasi dan nasi ayam telur asin. Ayam panggang dengan nasi terasa gurih, bumbunya pas, dan disajikan dengan saus yang lezat dan pedas. Ayam telur asin! Oh, ayam telur asinnya—sangat enak. Manis, gurih, dan renyah. Disajikan dengan nasi dan saus pedas yang sama. Suami saya sangat menyukainya sehingga ia harus mencoba burger ayam telur asin. Tanpa ragu, mungkin burger ayam terbaik yang pernah saya makan. Sangat enak dan pasti layak dikunjungi!

* Sekilas hanya ada tempat parkir di depan, tetapi ada lebih banyak tempat parkir di samping.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much for the wonderful review! 🇸🇬✨
We’re really happy you decided to give us a try on a whim — what a pleasant surprise for us too! It means a lot to hear how much you both enjoyed the food, from the Roast Chicken Rice to the Salted Egg Chicken and even the burger version (a crowd favourite! 😋).
Your kind words (and parking tip!) mean so much to our small team. Hope to see you both again soon for more hawker-style comfort food! 🙏

reviews.author: Has Jalil
reviews.text: Food was excellent and tasty.  Delicious and great presentation. Full of flavour and great customer service. It’s authentic and got that home mom and pop shop cooking. Delicious and nutritious.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya sangat enak dan lezat. Lezat dan penyajiannya bagus. Penuh cita rasa dan pelayanan pelanggan yang luar biasa. Rasanya otentik dan seperti masakan rumahan. Lezat dan bergizi.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much, Has Jalil for your wonderful review and lovely photos! 🇸🇬✨
We’re so happy you loved the food, flavours, and presentation, it truly means a lot to our small team. We put our heart into every dish to bring that authentic, home-style taste of Singapore. Your kind words made our day, and we can’t wait to welcome you back for more comforting, flavourful meals soon! 😋❤️

Warmly, 
Eric 
Hawker Buns Singapore Cafe

reviews.author: Fatima Haque
reviews.text: So yummy! I really liked the Nasi Lemak
reviews.textTranslated: Enak banget! Aku suka banget Nasi Lemaknya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Fatima for the love! 💞💞

reviews.author: Jason Tang
reviews.text: This place serves extremely authentic Singaporean/ Malaysian food. Very good laksa and hainanese chicken rice.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini menyajikan makanan Singapura/Malaysia yang sangat otentik. Laksa dan nasi ayam Hainan-nya sangat enak.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much, Jason for your wonderful review! We're truly grateful for your support and so happy to hear that you enjoyed the laksa and Hainanese chicken rice. Both dishes are close to our hearts and are prepared using traditional recipes to bring out the authentic flavors of Singapore and Malaysia.
We look forward to welcoming you back soon to explore more of our menu!

With gratitude, 
Eric 
Hawker Buns Cafe owner

reviews.author: Marcella Zheng
reviews.text: I lived in Singapore for quite sometime and I could not believe that we have a Singaporean restaurant here in Halifax! We came today for lunch and ordered Bandung (rose milk drink), hainanese roasted chicken rice and a plater of salted egg chicken and squid and of course kopi. Everything was sooo tasty and authentic!! I loved everything and could not wait to come again to try other dishes. Bonus point for the very friendly service from Sheila and chef Eric. Thank you for bringing me back to Singapore via your delicious dishes!!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya pernah tinggal di Singapura cukup lama dan saya tidak percaya bahwa kita memiliki restoran Singapura di Halifax! Kami datang hari ini untuk makan siang dan memesan Bandung (minuman susu mawar), nasi ayam panggang Hainan, dan sepiring ayam telur asin dan cumi-cumi, dan tentu saja kopi. Semuanya sangat enak dan otentik!! Saya menyukai semuanya dan tidak sabar untuk datang lagi untuk mencoba hidangan lainnya. Nilai tambah untuk pelayanan yang sangat ramah dari Sheila dan koki Eric. Terima kasih telah membawa saya kembali ke Singapura melalui hidangan lezat Anda!!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much, Marcella for your lovely message! It truly made our day. Hearing that our food reminded you of your time in Singapore is the greatest compliment we could receive. We put our hearts into every dish, so it means the world to know that came through.
We’re so happy you enjoyed the Bandung, roasted chicken rice, salted egg dishes, and kopi. Those are some of our personal favorites too! And thank you for your kind words about the service; it was a real pleasure having you with us.
We can’t wait to welcome you back again soon. Until then, terima kasih from the bottom of our hearts!

Warmest regards, 
Chef Eric & Shiela

reviews.author: Chuck Chang
reviews.text: The only thing to make the meal better would be chicken soup for the hainanese chicken rice.
reviews.textTranslated: Satu-satunya hal yang bisa membuat hidangan ini lebih enak adalah sup ayam untuk nasi ayam Hainan.

reviews.author: Kelly H
reviews.text: Finally was here to try salted egg burger. Made with fresh chicken, a spice kick and a lot of love. Wonderful family business and I am so excited to try more, especially the roasted Hainanese Chicken.
reviews.textTranslated: Akhirnya saya berkesempatan mencoba burger telur asin. Dibuat dengan ayam segar, bumbu yang menggugah selera, dan penuh cinta. Bisnis keluarga yang luar biasa dan saya sangat bersemangat untuk mencoba lebih banyak menu, terutama Ayam Hainan panggang.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much, Kelly for visiting and for the kind words! We're thrilled you enjoyed the salted egg burger — it’s one of our favorites too, made just the way we’d serve it in Singapore: fresh, flavorful, and with a whole lot of heart. We can’t wait to have you back to try the roasted Hainanese Chicken — it’s a special one. Appreciate your support for our family-run spot! 

Warmly, 
Eric 
Hawker Buns Cafe owner

reviews.author: Jonathan S
reviews.text: Best coffee in Nova Scotia? They're definitely a contender
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi terbaik di Nova Scotia? Mereka jelas salah satu kandidatnya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much! That’s such a huge compliment! ☕✨ We’ll keep brewing our best for you.

reviews.author: Chenxin Han
reviews.text: Their chicken and rice are both sooooooo amazing! Highly recommend!
reviews.textTranslated: Ayam dan nasi mereka sama-sama enak banget! Sangat direkomendasikan!

reviews.author: Queen Belizario
reviews.text: Went to try their Salted egg chicken, Beef Rendang, and Hainanese steamed chicken. It was cooked in an authentic way. It's worth every dollar. It was so satisfying. Would recommend this to everybody. If I can rate six stars. I would definitely do. The owner was very polite, kind, and even prepared our food personally.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya mencoba ayam telur asin, rendang daging sapi, dan ayam kukus Hainan mereka. Semuanya dimasak dengan cara yang otentik. Harganya sepadan. Sangat memuaskan. Saya akan merekomendasikan tempat ini kepada semua orang. Jika saya bisa memberi peringkat enam bintang, saya pasti akan melakukannya. Pemiliknya sangat sopan, ramah, dan bahkan menyiapkan makanan kami secara pribadi.

reviews.author: Mark Ferdinand Bonifacio
reviews.text: We had such a wonderful experience dining here! The flavors of the dishes were authentic and reminded me of the true taste of Singapore. Ordered laksa, beef randang and lemak burger everything are perfectly seasoned every bite was delicious and satisfying. The owner Eric was very welcoming, attentive, and made sure we had everything we needed. We definitely be coming back and highly recommend this restaurant to anyone craving genuine Singaporean dish.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami memiliki pengalaman bersantap yang luar biasa di sini! Cita rasa hidangannya otentik dan mengingatkan saya pada rasa asli Singapura. Kami memesan laksa, beef randang, dan lemak burger, semuanya dibumbui dengan sempurna, setiap gigitan terasa lezat dan memuaskan. Pemiliknya, Eric, sangat ramah, perhatian, dan memastikan kami mendapatkan semua yang kami butuhkan. Kami pasti akan kembali dan sangat merekomendasikan restoran ini kepada siapa pun yang mendambakan hidangan Singapura asli.

reviews.author: Angela Carter
reviews.text: Wow! I will be eating here everytime I'm in the area. The salted egg burger was awesome! And the laksa was like a mix of Ramen and Thai curry. I highly recommend this place. And the service was lovely.
reviews.textTranslated: Wow! Saya akan makan di sini setiap kali saya berada di daerah ini. Burger telur asinnya luar biasa! Dan laksanya seperti campuran ramen dan kari Thailand. Saya sangat merekomendasikan tempat ini. Dan pelayanannya juga menyenangkan.

reviews.author: Nicole Bourque
reviews.text: Hidden Gem! Incredible food in a tiny little spot in bedford. Our new favorite spot! We will come back every time we visit Halifax for sure!
reviews.textTranslated: Permata tersembunyi! Makanan luar biasa di tempat kecil di Bedford. Tempat favorit baru kami! Kami pasti akan kembali setiap kali mengunjungi Halifax!

reviews.author: Steven Bourque
reviews.text: Food was absolutely delicious. Good portions too. Highly recommended.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya benar-benar enak. Porsinya juga banyak. Sangat direkomendasikan.

reviews.author: Frey Cai
reviews.text: Eric and his restaurant suprised me very much. The hainanese chicken and steamed rice together have very special flavor which worths 5 stars for sure. Will be back to try other dishes! Good luck Eric!
reviews.textTranslated: Eric dan restorannya sangat mengejutkan saya. Ayam Hainan dan nasi putihnya memiliki cita rasa yang sangat istimewa, yang pasti layak mendapatkan 5 bintang. Saya akan kembali untuk mencoba hidangan lainnya! Semoga sukses, Eric!

reviews.author: Samheeta Chakraborty
reviews.text: Absolutely delicious food, the salted egg chicken burger and hainanese rice just blew out mind. Very friendly owner and clean place. Highly recommend!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya benar-benar lezat, burger ayam telur asin dan nasi Hainan-nya sungguh luar biasa. Pemiliknya sangat ramah dan tempatnya bersih. Sangat direkomendasikan!

reviews.author: Zachary Campbell
reviews.text: Visited this restaurant on a whim and was very impressed by the food.  The salted egg chicken was flavorful and crispy. I will be coming back to try the other items.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya mengunjungi restoran ini secara spontan dan sangat terkesan dengan makanannya. Ayam telur asinnya lezat dan renyah. Saya akan kembali untuk mencoba menu lainnya.

reviews.author: Penny Liu (Penny)
reviews.text: The food is so good! I’ve been to Singapore and this place reminds me so much about it. Steamed chicken rice and salted egg chicken are must try!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak banget! Aku pernah ke Singapura dan tempat ini mengingatkan aku banget sama Singapura. Nasi ayam kukus dan ayam telur asin wajib dicoba!

reviews.author: —3NDRY0
reviews.text: The best customer service, owner was super nice. Food brought back memories, and while it wasn't served in an actual hawker center, it still had that flavour. The nasi lemak and the iced tea really brought me back to the other side of the world, back in my home.
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanan pelanggan terbaik, pemiliknya sangat ramah. Makanannya membangkitkan kenangan, dan meskipun tidak disajikan di pusat jajanan sungguhan, rasanya tetap terasa. Nasi lemak dan es teh benar-benar membawa saya kembali ke belahan dunia lain, kembali ke rumah saya.

reviews.author: Jainam Jasani
reviews.text: Worst place ever i have visited, The guy is only 1 in whole restaurant and so unprofessional and rudely behaviour. I highly recommend not to visit. For 1 burger he takes 30 mins !! Seriously after 30 mins waiting he said another 12 min with smiling face !! Please respect customer who ordered food !! Like this no customer no business!! In addition, after calling few times he is not answering staying behind curtains. Disappointed!!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat terburuk yang pernah saya kunjungi. Hanya ada satu orang di seluruh restoran dan perilakunya sangat tidak profesional dan kasar. Saya sangat menyarankan untuk tidak berkunjung. Untuk satu burger, dia membutuhkan waktu 30 menit!! Serius, setelah menunggu 30 menit dia bilang butuh 12 menit lagi dengan wajah tersenyum!! Tolong hargai pelanggan yang sudah memesan makanan!! Dengan begitu, tidak ada pelanggan, tidak ada bisnis!! Selain itu, setelah beberapa kali menelepon, dia tidak menjawab dan hanya bersembunyi di balik tirai. Mengecewakan!!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Jainam,
We’re truly sorry to hear about your disappointing experience with us. This is not the level of service we strive to provide, and we sincerely apologize for the long wait time and for how you felt treated during your visit. We completely understand how frustrating that must have been.
We’re still a small team, and sometimes things don’t run as smoothly as they should — but that’s no excuse. Your feedback is very important, and we’ll be using it to improve both our service and communication with guests moving forward.
We’d love the opportunity to make this right if you’re open to it. Please reach out to us directly at 782-882-6179 and we’ll do our best to ensure your next experience is much better.
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback — it helps us grow and serve our customers better.

Hawker Buns Team

reviews.author: Mitchell G
reviews.text:
The Expirience

As others have said, the owner is really friendly and you can tell he is very passionate about what he does. The owner greeted us when we sat down, and spent some time talking to us before taking our order himself.

The Food

My family and I ordered the nasi lemak. The chicken is deep-fried but didn't feel like it was swimming in oil. The breading was crisp and light, and the actual chicken was super moist+ tender. The chilli had great flavor and a good kick, but wasn't too spicy. Overall, we thought the food was great and felt satiated by the portion size.

Conclusion

If you want a really tasty meal, friendly service, and a great view close by, you won't regret coming to this place 🙂
reviews.textTranslated:
Pengalaman

Seperti yang dikatakan orang lain, pemiliknya sangat ramah dan Anda dapat melihat bahwa dia sangat bersemangat dengan apa yang dia lakukan. Pemilik menyambut kami saat kami duduk, dan meluangkan waktu untuk mengobrol dengan kami sebelum mengambil pesanan kami sendiri.

Makanan

Keluarga saya dan saya memesan nasi lemak. Ayamnya digoreng tetapi tidak terasa seperti terendam minyak. Lapisan tepungnya renyah dan ringan, dan ayamnya sendiri sangat lembut dan empuk. Sausnya memiliki rasa yang enak dan sedikit pedas, tetapi tidak terlalu pedas. Secara keseluruhan, kami merasa makanannya enak dan merasa kenyang dengan porsi yang diberikan.

Kesimpulan

Jika Anda menginginkan makanan yang benar-benar lezat, pelayanan yang ramah, dan pemandangan indah di dekatnya, Anda tidak akan menyesal datang ke tempat ini 🙂

reviews.author: Sabah Abdullah
reviews.text:
We're absolutely thrilled to finally have a Singaporean restaurant in Halifax! Our first taste included the Nasi Lemak, which was a true standout. The coconut-infused rice was spot-on, complementing the chicken and their superb homemade sambal sauce beautifully. The iced lemon tea and milk tea were also excellent. Definitely eager to try more of their dishes soon!

And a special shout-out to the owners, they’re wonderfully friendly and welcoming 😊
reviews.textTranslated:
Kami sangat senang akhirnya ada restoran Singapura di Halifax! Hidangan pertama yang kami coba adalah Nasi Lemak, yang benar-benar luar biasa. Nasi yang diberi santan sangat pas, melengkapi ayam dan saus sambal buatan sendiri yang luar biasa dengan sempurna. Es teh lemon dan teh susu juga sangat enak. Pasti ingin mencoba lebih banyak hidangan mereka segera!

Dan ucapan terima kasih khusus kepada pemiliknya, mereka sangat ramah dan hangat 😊

reviews.author: Cee Tee (Hobnail)
reviews.text: The laksa is extremely delicious, a warm and rich coconut curry broth with well cooked noodles, I will be back for more!
reviews.textTranslated: Laksa di sini sangat lezat, kuah kari santan yang hangat dan kaya rasa dengan mi yang matang sempurna, saya pasti akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: Munira Adenwalla
reviews.text:
This was the best and most unique meal we have had in a very long time.

We ordered their signature salted chicken with rice. Everything was incredible.

Perfect balance of flavours.

Not too sweet, just the right balance of umami. The chicken was perfectly crispy. The added flavour from the fried crispy curry leaves was soooo delicious. And even rice which is often nothing special was the right texture and had some delicious flavouring that complimented the chicken so well.

We quite accidentally landed in Bedford and so happy we did to have bumped into this place. Just wish we were here a tad longer to have tried the laksa which I’m sure is delicious too.

Massively recommend everyone try this place.

Oh and the owner was really nice too. They’ve lived and studied cooking in Singapore for 10 years which says so much.

Enjoy.
reviews.textTranslated:
Ini adalah makanan terbaik dan paling unik yang pernah kami makan dalam waktu yang sangat lama.

Kami memesan ayam asin andalan mereka dengan nasi. Semuanya luar biasa.

Keseimbangan rasa yang sempurna.

Tidak terlalu manis, hanya keseimbangan umami yang pas. Ayamnya sangat renyah. Tambahan rasa dari daun kari goreng yang renyah sangat lezat. Dan bahkan nasi yang seringkali biasa saja memiliki tekstur yang tepat dan bumbu yang lezat yang melengkapi ayam dengan sangat baik.

Kami secara tidak sengaja mendarat di Bedford dan sangat senang bisa menemukan tempat ini. Hanya berharap kami berada di sini sedikit lebih lama untuk mencoba laksa yang saya yakin juga lezat.

Sangat merekomendasikan semua orang untuk mencoba tempat ini.

Oh, dan pemiliknya juga sangat ramah. Mereka telah tinggal dan belajar memasak di Singapura selama 10 tahun, yang menunjukkan betapa hebatnya mereka.

Selamat menikmati.

reviews.author: Hydronatior lol
reviews.text: Really good
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat bagus

reviews.author: Mohammad Said
reviews.text: Food and the owner r amazing
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan dan pemiliknya luar biasa.

reviews.author: Bonn Ferrer
reviews.text: A review no one asked for, BUT is totally needed!! As someone who craves Singaporean food (I mean the authentic kind, just like what they have in their hawker stalls), I felt like I was transported back to SG! Their Salted Egg Chicken was our TOP choice out of everything we ordered! The Hainanese Chicken looked a bit like jerky, but WOW OH WOW, a love letter to Singapore in a plate! And don’t even get me started on the Lemon Tea and the Kopi Teh… I mean?? Just try it in Bedford! 🤤⭐️🤌✨
reviews.textTranslated: Ulasan yang sebenarnya tidak diminta siapa pun, TAPI sangat dibutuhkan!! Sebagai seseorang yang mendambakan makanan Singapura (maksud saya yang autentik, seperti yang ada di warung makan kaki lima mereka), saya merasa seperti kembali ke Singapura! Ayam Telur Asin mereka adalah pilihan TERBAIK kami dari semua yang kami pesan! Ayam Hainan terlihat agak seperti dendeng, tapi WOW OH WOW, sebuah surat cinta untuk Singapura dalam satu piring! Dan jangan tanya soal Teh Lemon dan Kopi Teh… maksud saya?? Coba saja di Bedford! 🤤⭐️🤌✨

reviews.author: Louis Zhao
reviews.text:
Salted egg chicken - must have
Hainanese chicken - must have
Singapore Iced lemon tea - must have

Above are super authentic! Thanks for bringing these wonderful dishes to Halifax!

Chef said they will expand the menu to include more Singapore dishes. Can’t wait!
reviews.textTranslated:
Ayam telur asin - wajib coba
Ayam Hainan - wajib coba
Es teh lemon Singapura - wajib coba

Semuanya sangat otentik! Terima kasih telah membawa hidangan-hidangan luar biasa ini ke Halifax!

Koki mengatakan mereka akan memperluas menu untuk memasukkan lebih banyak hidangan Singapura. Tak sabar!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much for your wonderful feedback! 🌟
We’re thrilled you enjoyed our salted egg chicken, Hainanese chicken, and Singapore iced lemon tea — they’re some of our personal favourites too.
Our chef is just as excited as you are about expanding the menu, and we’ve got more classic Singaporean favourites in the works. We can’t wait for you to try them! Your support means the world to us, and we look forward to welcoming you back soon for even more delicious flavours.
With gratitude, 
Hawker Buns Team

reviews.author: Zach N/A
reviews.text: Came here with my wife and we both had the salted egg chicken burger. We agreed afterwards that it was probably the best chicken burger either of us have had; the sauce was delicious, the chicken was unbelievably crispy (even under the bun with the sauce, somehow!), and it as also a very generous portion of chicken. We're looking forward to coming back to try the rest of the menu.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya datang ke sini bersama istri dan kami berdua memesan burger ayam telur asin. Setelah itu, kami sepakat bahwa itu mungkin burger ayam terbaik yang pernah kami makan; sausnya lezat, ayamnya sangat renyah (bahkan di bawah roti dengan sausnya!), dan porsinya juga sangat banyak. Kami berharap dapat kembali untuk mencoba menu lainnya.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Zach, 
Thanks so much for taking the time to leave such a lovely message. It really means a lot! We’re super happy to hear that you and your wife enjoyed the salted egg chicken burger.

It’s awesome to know it made an impression, and we’re glad the portion hit the spot too. Your support truly keeps us going, and we can't wait to see you again soon!

Thanks again for the kind words!

Warmly,
Eric & Hawker Buns Singapore team

reviews.author: Tony Rojsawangthip
reviews.text: The owner runs the whole place by himself and is incredibly friendly and welcoming. The burgers are juicy and flavourful, and the steamed chicken I ordered is tender and delicious.
reviews.textTranslated: Pemiliknya menjalankan seluruh tempat ini seorang diri dan sangat ramah serta bersahabat. Burgernya juicy dan beraroma, dan ayam kukus yang saya pesan empuk dan lezat.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you so much for the love! 💛
I’m thrilled you enjoyed the burgers and the steamed chicken, both are made fresh with recipes I’m proud of. Running the place solo is a lot of work, but it’s guests like you who make every moment worth it.
Your support keeps me going, and I can’t wait to have you back for more juicy, flavour-packed dishes! 

With gratitude, 
Eric 
Hawker Buns Singapore

reviews.author: Jejak Wira
reviews.text: The Sambal way too sweet, the chicken??? U can see the picture 😩, not worth 3 hours of drive
reviews.textTranslated: Sambalnya terlalu manis, ayamnya??? Lihat gambarnya 😩, tidak sepadan dengan perjalanan 3 jam.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Jejak, 
We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your experience, and we’re really sorry to hear that we didn’t meet your expectations, especially after a 3-hour drive.
We’ve taken note of your feedback about the sambal. Since it’s made fresh in-house using natural ingredients, the taste can vary slightly from batch to batch. While we value that authenticity, we also understand it may not suit everyone’s personal taste. Your feedback is valid, and we’ll take it on board as we continue to fine-tune our recipe and keep it balanced.
Regarding the chicken, we’ve taken a look at your photo and will be following up with the kitchen team to ensure everything stays up to standard moving forward.
It’s never easy to receive this kind of feedback, but it’s important and it helps us grow. If you’re open to it, I’d love the opportunity to invite you back and personally make sure your next visit is a better one. You’re welcome to DM us. 

Thanks again for giving us a try. We truly hope we can turn this around for you.
Warm regards, 
Eric
Owner, Hawker Buns Singapore Cafe

reviews.author: Erin Samson
reviews.text:
First time to have Singaporean dish and truly enjoyed every single bite 😋

K&M
reviews.textTranslated:
Pertama kali mencoba masakan Singapura dan benar-benar menikmati setiap suapannya 😋

K&M

reviews.author: Alastair Trower
reviews.text: Saw the poster for Laksa from the road driving past. Haven't seen it on a menu since I stopped traveling to SE Asia 10 years ago.  Pulled in tonight, worth the stop, very friendly owner, great laksa.  Son had Char Siew Pork.  Owner also brought out a tray of salted egg fried chicken to try, deadly good.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya melihat poster Laksa dari jalan saat berkendara. Sudah lama tidak melihatnya di menu sejak saya berhenti bepergian ke Asia Tenggara 10 tahun yang lalu. Saya mampir malam ini, dan memang layak dikunjungi, pemiliknya sangat ramah, dan laksanya enak sekali. Anak saya memesan Char Siew Pork. Pemiliknya juga membawakan sepiring ayam goreng telur asin untuk dicicipi, enak banget.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Alastair, 
Thank you so much for stopping in and for your kind words! 🙏
We’re glad the laksa caught your eye and brought back memories of your travels, it’s one of our favourites too.
We look forward to welcoming you back anytime for more Singaporean street food (and yes, plenty of parking is always ready for you 😊).

With gratitude, 
Eric 
Hawker Buns Singapore

reviews.author: Enrico Bautista
reviews.text:
A promising newcomer for inviting, casual, and delicious Singaporean comfort food.

Hawker Buns location, right off the Bedford Highway is convenient with ample parking and the interior is clean, cosy and homely.

It is an excellent pick for Singaporean comfort food. The staff were friendly and attentive and clearly cared for guests  experience. The salted egg chicken came hot and crispy, in a delicious savory sauce. The salted egg chicken burger hits similarly, with a generous sized fillet. Both roasted and steamed Hainanese chicken rice are fragrant, tender, and well seasoned.

The drinks trend towards the sweet: the iced lemon tea is tangy and refreshing, while the iced kopi is smooth and a pleasant bitter sweet.

As a whole, it is a place that is well worth a repeat visit.
reviews.textTranslated:
Pendatang baru yang menjanjikan untuk makanan rumahan Singapura yang lezat, santai, dan nyaman.

Lokasi Hawker Buns, tepat di pinggir Bedford Highway, sangat strategis dengan tempat parkir yang luas dan interiornya bersih, nyaman, dan seperti di rumah sendiri.

Ini adalah pilihan yang sangat baik untuk makanan rumahan Singapura. Stafnya ramah dan penuh perhatian, dan jelas peduli dengan pengalaman tamu. Ayam telur asinnya panas dan renyah, dengan saus gurih yang lezat. Burger ayam telur asinnya juga sama enaknya, dengan potongan fillet yang besar. Baik nasi ayam Hainan panggang maupun kukus harum, empuk, dan bumbunya pas.

Minumannya cenderung manis: es teh lemonnya asam dan menyegarkan, sedangkan es kopinya lembut dan memiliki rasa pahit manis yang menyenangkan.

Secara keseluruhan, ini adalah tempat yang layak untuk dikunjungi kembali.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Enrico, 

Thank you so much for your thoughtful review and kind words! We’re delighted to hear you enjoyed our Singaporean comfort food, from the salted egg chicken to the Hainanese chicken rice, and even our drinks selection.
Our team takes pride in making every guest feel welcome, so it means a lot that you noticed the care and effort. We look forward to serving you again soon  and we’ll have more delicious Singaporean flavours waiting for you on your next visit! 🇸🇬✨

With gratitude, 
Eric 
Hawker Buns Singapore Cafe

reviews.author: Chad “Foodie_87”
reviews.text: We ordered from Hawker recently. The food was absolutely delicious and tasted very authentic to the real thing from Singapore.  But, for the price (Almost $30 for Chicken, rice and a few cucumbers) we thought the portions would be a bit bigger than what was delivered. Other than the portion size and price was great and will definitely have again.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami baru-baru ini memesan makanan dari Hawker. Makanannya benar-benar lezat dan rasanya sangat otentik seperti makanan asli Singapura. Namun, dengan harga tersebut (hampir $30 untuk ayam, nasi, dan beberapa mentimun), kami pikir porsinya akan sedikit lebih besar daripada yang diantarkan. Selain itu, ukuran porsi dan harganya sangat bagus dan kami pasti akan memesan lagi.

reviews.author: marvs
reviews.text:
The roasted chicken rice was delicious, but the chili that came with it really brought me back to Singapore! Glad to see more southeast asian options in the city!

Can't wait to try more of the menu! Cheers to Sir Eric 🙏🏽 Thank you for adding this amazing cuisine to the Halifax food scene 🤩
reviews.textTranslated:
Nasi ayam panggangnya enak banget, tapi sambal yang menyertainya benar-benar mengingatkan saya pada Singapura! Senang sekali melihat lebih banyak pilihan masakan Asia Tenggara di kota ini!

Tidak sabar untuk mencoba menu lainnya! Salut untuk Sir Eric 🙏🏽 Terima kasih telah menambahkan masakan luar biasa ini ke kancah kuliner Halifax 🤩

reviews.author: Smitty Smitjr
reviews.text: Place is amazing was surprised how big the burger was definitely recommended
reviews.textTranslated: Tempatnya luar biasa, saya terkejut betapa besar burgernya, sangat direkomendasikan.

reviews.author: Rebecca MacIntosh
reviews.text: Amazingly delicious food! If you want giant portions and a giant meju, this isn't the place for you. They have a small menu, and their portions are big enough for most, and it is so, SO good!!! I love that they are confident in their menu, and it is truly a place worth trying! Will definitely be back to try more!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya luar biasa lezat! Jika Anda menginginkan porsi besar dan meju yang besar, ini bukan tempat yang tepat untuk Anda. Mereka memiliki menu yang kecil, dan porsinya cukup besar untuk kebanyakan orang, dan rasanya sangat, SANGAT enak!!! Saya suka bahwa mereka percaya diri dengan menu mereka, dan ini benar-benar tempat yang layak dicoba! Pasti akan kembali untuk mencoba lebih banyak lagi!

reviews.author: Thomas Hiltz
reviews.text:
Tried the Iced Kofi and the salted egg yolk chicken. Truly unlike anything you can get elsewhere in Halifax, and some of the punchiest flavour you can ask for.

On the way out of the store, the I told the chef that we would be back if it was good, and he assured me I would be back.

Well safe to say, he's made a repeat customer.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya mencoba Iced Kofi dan ayam kuning telur asin. Benar-benar berbeda dari apa pun yang bisa Anda dapatkan di tempat lain di Halifax, dan memiliki cita rasa yang sangat kuat.

Saat keluar dari toko, saya mengatakan kepada koki bahwa kami akan kembali jika rasanya enak, dan dia meyakinkan saya bahwa saya akan kembali.

Bisa dibilang, dia telah mendapatkan pelanggan tetap.

reviews.author: Mauie Caesar Cagunot
reviews.text: 100% Singaporean food! It's worth the trip. We've been craving for authentic SG food and it did not disappoint. We ordered chicken rice and laksa and the flavors are all there. Highly recommended and will definitely come back.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Singapura 100%! Sangat layak untuk dikunjungi. Kami sudah lama ngidam makanan Singapura otentik dan tidak mengecewakan. Kami memesan nasi ayam dan laksa, dan rasanya sangat pas. Sangat direkomendasikan dan pasti akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Joël Samson
reviews.text: Hidden gem on the Bedford Highway.
reviews.textTranslated: Permata tersembunyi di Bedford Highway.

reviews.author: Caitlin Spears
reviews.text: Very much enjoyed our first time here, and we will definitely be returning!
reviews.textTranslated: Kami sangat menikmati kunjungan pertama kami di sini, dan kami pasti akan kembali!

reviews.author: CallMeMrFrog
reviews.text: Loved my meal and trying those of my friends. Will have to visit again when he expands the menu.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sangat menikmati makanan saya dan ingin mencoba makanan teman-teman saya. Saya pasti akan berkunjung lagi ketika dia memperluas menunya.

reviews.author: Szu Toh
reviews.text: We were very excited when we found out that there is a place selling Singaporean food and headed down the next day. As a Singaporean who moved to Nova Scotia, I’ve definitely missed hawker food and the taste of home. We will definitely be back!
reviews.textTranslated: Kami sangat gembira ketika mengetahui ada tempat yang menjual makanan Singapura dan langsung menuju ke sana keesokan harinya. Sebagai warga Singapura yang pindah ke Nova Scotia, saya sangat merindukan makanan kaki lima dan cita rasa kampung halaman. Kami pasti akan kembali!

reviews.author: Gracienatics
reviews.text: Highly recommended! We'll be back for Laksa! :)  - Xena's 🐈‍⬛
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat direkomendasikan! Kami akan kembali untuk Laksa! :) - Xena's 🐈‍⬛

reviews.author: Ma Alvarez
reviews.text: Masarap 👍🏻
reviews.textTranslated: Enak sekali 👍🏻

reviews.author: Cheez Sam
reviews.text: The food was outstanding! Everything we have ordered was rich in flavor and perfectly cooked. Had great experience and will definitely come back!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya luar biasa! Semua yang kami pesan kaya rasa dan dimasak dengan sempurna. Pengalaman yang menyenangkan dan pasti akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: helen Meharg
reviews.text:
Laksa was not  coconut based 3 shrimp
Overpriced
Deep fried chicken wings in nasi lamak
Disappointed
reviews.textTranslated:
Laksa bukan berbahan dasar santan, 3 udang
Terlalu mahal
Sayap ayam goreng tepung dalam nasi lamak
Kecewa
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Helen, 
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. I'm truly sorry to hear that your recent experience with us didn't meet your expectations.
I did want to clarify that our laksa does use coconut milk as part of the broth, though we understand the flavour may vary depending on the regional styles you’re used to. We aim for a balanced, aromatic base, but I completely respect that taste is subjective — and I’m sorry it didn’t hit the mark for you. Regarding the shrimp portion and the pricing, your comments are noted—we constantly review both quality and value to ensure we’re offering the best experience possible.
As for the nasi lemak, the deep-fried chicken wings are our house style, but we completely understand preferences vary. I'm sorry it wasn’t to your liking.
We never want our guests to leave disappointed, and I’d love the opportunity to make this right. 

 I hope you’ll give us another chance — and if you do, please feel free to reach out to me directly. I’d love to personally ensure your next experience is a great one.

Warm regards, 
Eric
Owner, Hawker Buns Singapore

reviews.author: Henri Bisson
reviews.text:
Went here to get some nasi lemak for me and my wife today, because it was recommended by one of my wife's friends. The nasi lemak was delicious and the sambal was also delicious. It is sweet and spicy.

The young man caring for my order was very polite and professional.

The atmosphere was simple but very welcoming, like visiting your mom and dad's for supper.

Will definitely be coming back again to try more of their food.
reviews.textTranslated:
Hari ini saya pergi ke sini untuk membeli nasi lemak untuk saya dan istri, karena direkomendasikan oleh salah satu teman istri saya. Nasi lemaknya enak sekali dan sambalnya juga enak. Rasanya manis dan pedas.

Pemuda yang melayani pesanan saya sangat sopan dan profesional.

Suasananya sederhana tapi sangat ramah, seperti mengunjungi orang tua Anda untuk makan malam.

Pasti akan kembali lagi untuk mencoba makanan mereka yang lain.

reviews.author: sairaj coondapur
reviews.text:
Tried this place today for 1st time & oh boy glad I did. The Salted Egg Chicken burger was flavor explosion in every bite. Stacked with fresh crunchy lettuce & cucumbers also the perfect kick from curry leaves.
Teh Tarik drink was full of flavor as well. Ower Eric was very friendly explaining their menu and took great pride in showcasing his cuisine. Will definitely be back to try the Nasi Lemak next time🤤
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya mencoba tempat ini hari ini untuk pertama kalinya & wah, saya senang sekali. Burger Ayam Telur Asinnya benar-benar meledak rasa di setiap gigitannya. Dilengkapi dengan selada dan mentimun segar yang renyah, serta sentuhan sempurna dari daun kari.
Minuman Teh Tarik juga sangat lezat. Pemiliknya, Eric, sangat ramah dan menjelaskan menu mereka dengan baik, serta sangat bangga menampilkan masakannya. Saya pasti akan kembali untuk mencoba Nasi Lemak lain kali🤤

reviews.author: Shawn Woods
reviews.text: Just tried the salted egg chicken and rice and omg yummm, the flavors are amazing.. definitely will be seeing me again
reviews.textTranslated: Baru saja mencoba ayam telur asin dan nasi, dan ya ampun enak banget, rasanya luar biasa... pasti akan datang lagi.

reviews.author: Kyle Steele
reviews.text:
For starters, Eric (chef and owner) is awesome. Incredibly welcoming, and it was great to hear of his background working in the restaurant industry in SE Asia.

For a taste of Malaysia and/or Singapore, this is THE option in Halifax and we’re very lucky to have it. We had the nasi lemak (pictured) and the chicken rice, along with  sample of the salted egg chicken. The nasi lemak was good as was the chicken rice! Close enough to what you would get in-country, and a great substitute instead of flying 26 hours to get it. The salted egg chicken though… that is addictive. So good that we ordered some for takeout so we could snack on it tomorrow.

Looking forward to trying to burger versions next time we’re there!

Eric, keep up the great work, and thank you for being the person to finally bring flavours of Malaysia to Halifax! We’re looking forward to our return.
reviews.textTranslated:
Pertama-tama, Eric (koki dan pemilik) sangat luar biasa. Sangat ramah, dan menyenangkan mendengar latar belakangnya bekerja di industri restoran di Asia Tenggara.

Untuk merasakan cita rasa Malaysia dan/atau Singapura, ini adalah pilihan TERBAIK di Halifax dan kami sangat beruntung memilikinya.
