Kami memesan nasi lemak (seperti yang terlihat di gambar) dan nasi ayam, beserta sampel ayam telur asin. Nasi lemaknya enak, begitu pula nasi ayamnya! Cukup mirip dengan yang Anda dapatkan di negara asalnya, dan merupakan pengganti yang bagus daripada terbang selama 26 jam untuk mendapatkannya. Namun, ayam telur asinnya… itu bikin ketagihan. Sangat enak sehingga kami memesan beberapa untuk dibawa pulang agar bisa kami nikmati besok.

Kami berharap dapat mencoba versi burgernya lain kali kami ke sana!

Eric, teruskan pekerjaan hebatmu, dan terima kasih telah menjadi orang yang akhirnya membawa cita rasa Malaysia ke Halifax! Kami menantikan kunjungan kami berikutnya.

reviews.author: Nancy Virk
reviews.text: Must try salted egg chicken. First time tried Singapore food was worth it so good..♥️
reviews.textTranslated: Wajib coba ayam telur asin. Pertama kali mencoba makanan Singapura dan sangat enak..♥️
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much, Nancy for your kind words! 😊 We're thrilled you enjoyed the salted egg chicken — it's one of our specialties and a favorite among our customers. So glad your first taste of Singaporean food was a great one. Hope to welcome you back soon for more delicious bites! ♥️🇸🇬

reviews.author: Guy Marie Antonio
reviews.text:
Tried this place for the first time and wow—it did not disappoint. The food was super tasty. You can tell everything was fresh and made with care.

Definitely coming back. If you’re in the area, it’s worth checking out!
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya mencoba tempat ini untuk pertama kalinya dan wow—tidak mengecewakan. Makanannya sangat enak. Terlihat jelas bahwa semuanya segar dan dibuat dengan penuh perhatian.

Pasti akan kembali lagi. Jika Anda berada di daerah tersebut, tempat ini layak untuk dikunjungi!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Guy, 

Thank you so much for the kind words! We're thrilled to hear you enjoyed your first visit and that the freshness and care in our food came through — that means a lot to our team.

We can't wait to welcome you back again soon. Thanks for the support and for recommending us to others!

Warm regards,
Hawker Buns Team

reviews.author: Bogey Golf
reviews.text: Great food and delicious drinks.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan enak dan minuman lezat.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for your kind words! We're delighted to hear you enjoyed our food and drinks. We look forward to welcoming you back soon for another great experience! 😊🍽️🍹

reviews.author: Aaron Capulong
reviews.text: Great food and drinks. I recommend the salted egg chicken and their iced coffee.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan dan minumannya enak sekali. Saya merekomendasikan ayam telur asin dan es kopinya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for the recommendation! We’re glad you enjoyed the salted egg chicken and our iced coffee — two of our favorites too! Hope to see you again soon for more delicious bites and sips! 😊

reviews.author: Kat L
reviews.text: Finally have salted egg chicken in Hfx! They have a whole container to share with 2 or 3 people. Beware tho it’s addictively a bit spicy. Would probably ask to make it less or not spicy at all next time. Also would die to have that flavor in my fries similar to Irvin chips. We also ordered Nasi Lemak burger with Iced Teh Tarik and Iced Kopi. Drinks were fantastic and can’t wait for them to add kopi roti or kaya toast to pair it with. Owners were really nice and accommodating. Location has lots of parking and interior is still on the works but has lots of tables to dine in. Heads up it is also shared with Atithi Indian Restaurant which got us confused at first. Both have signs up on the window. Overall going to go back again once everything is set up.
reviews.textTranslated: Akhirnya ada ayam telur asin di HFX! Mereka punya wadah besar untuk dibagi 2 atau 3 orang. Tapi hati-hati, rasanya agak pedas dan bikin ketagihan. Mungkin lain kali saya akan minta dikurangi atau dihilangkan sama sekali. Saya juga ingin sekali kentang gorengnya juga rasanya mirip dengan Irvin Chips. Kami juga memesan burger Nasi Lemak dengan Es Teh Tarik dan Es Kopi. Minumannya fantastis dan saya tidak sabar menunggu mereka menambahkan kopi roti atau roti kaya untuk dipadukan dengannya. Pemiliknya sangat ramah dan membantu. Lokasinya memiliki banyak tempat parkir dan interiornya masih dalam pengerjaan tetapi memiliki banyak meja untuk makan. Perlu diketahui juga bahwa tempat ini berbagi dengan Restoran India Atithi yang awalnya membuat kami bingung. Keduanya memiliki papan nama di jendela. Secara keseluruhan, saya akan kembali lagi setelah semuanya selesai.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Kat,

Thank you so much for the thoughtful and detailed review — we’re thrilled you enjoyed the salted egg chicken and had a great overall experience with us!

You’re right — it does come with a bit of a spicy kick! While we’re not able to adjust the spice level on that dish, we appreciate you mentioning it for others, and we’re always looking for ways to make the experience even better.

Also — great news! We do offer salted egg fries 😄 If you're craving that same rich, savoury flavour with a crispy twist, definitely give them a try next time.

We’re so glad you enjoyed the nasi lemak burger, teh tarik, and kopi. Kaya toast and kopi roti are definitely on our radar once the kitchen setup is fully in place — we’re excited to share more of those nostalgic flavours with you soon.

Thanks again for the support and for noting the shared space with Atithi — we’re working on improving signage to make things clearer for all guests.

Looking forward to welcoming you back again soon!

Warmly, 
Hawker Buns Team

reviews.author: Kim Hirtle
reviews.text: Great new flavours in the neighbourhood! Glad to see more options in Bedford!
reviews.textTranslated: Cita rasa baru yang luar biasa di lingkungan sekitar! Senang melihat lebih banyak pilihan di Bedford!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much! We’re excited to bring new flavors to Bedford and happy to be part of the neighborhood. Looking forward to serving you more tasty options soon! 😊

reviews.author: Ronjit Mukherjee
reviews.text: Really fun flavors I hadn't tried before and super friendly people
reviews.textTranslated: Cita rasa yang sangat unik dan belum pernah saya coba sebelumnya, serta orang-orangnya sangat ramah.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re really happy to hear you enjoyed discovering new and fun flavors with us. Our team always strives to create a welcoming and friendly atmosphere, so it’s wonderful to know that came through. We look forward to having you back soon for more delicious and exciting dishes — there’s always something new to try! 😊🍽️✨
